title: Japanese Potato Bake
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Japanese-inspired potato bake. Perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Poke some holes in the potatoes with a fork to allow steam to escape.
Rub the potatoes with herbal oil and sprinkle with starch.
Place the potatoes directly on the middle rack of the oven.
Bake for 45-60 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork.
While the potatoes are baking, prepare the crispy garlic by frying it in a pan until crispy.
Once the potatoes are done, remove them from the oven and garnish with crispy garlic.
